errors.not_authenticated: You must log in to continue.
errors.token_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

auth.twoFactorPrompt: Enter the code from your authenticator app.
auth.completeBrowserLogin: Please complete login in your browser.
auth.steamNoAccount: No {{provider}} account is linked to your Steam account.
auth.steamHaveAccount: Do you have an existing {{provider}} account?

settings.title: Settings
settings.themeDescription: Choose a visual theme for the launcher.
settings.authModeDescription: Choose how you want to authenticate when connecting to servers.
settings.oidcAuthDesc: Login with your {{provider}} account for server access
settings.byondAuthDesc: Login with your BYOND account, or via the pager
settings.devDescription: Connect to a local development server.
settings.byondPagerWarning: BYOND pager is not running. You can either open BYOND and log in, or use web login below.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the display language for the launcher.
settings.richPresenceDescription: Show your current game activity on Discord and Steam.

servers.externalLinkPrompt: This will open in your browser:
servers.whitelistPrompt: This server requires you to be whitelisted before joining.
servers.whitelistConfirm: I am whitelisted on this server.
servers.tosRequired: This server requires you to accept their terms of service before joining.

home.noFavorites: Star servers from the Browse tab to see them here.

directConnect.title: Direct Connect
directConnect.hint: Enter a server address to connect directly.
directConnect.domainAttestedInfo: The operator of this server has verified control of
directConnect.domainAttestedDetail: This does not guarantee the server is who you expect. Only continue if you recognise this domain.
directConnect.unreachableWarning: This server could not be reached.
directConnect.unreachableDetail: The server may be offline or behind a firewall. You can still attempt to connect.
directConnect.selfReportedWarning: This server claims to support hub authentication, but its identity has not been verified.
directConnect.selfReportedDetail: Your auth credentials will be sent to this server. Only continue if you trust this address.
directConnect.byondOnlyInfo: This server does not support hub authentication. You will connect with BYOND login only.
directConnect.rememberTrust: Don't ask again for this address

singleplayer.title: Sandbox
singleplayer.description: Run a local server to explore maps, test features, and experiment with admin tools. Not a playable single-player experience.
singleplayer.downloadingHint: This may take a while depending on your connection...

wine.resetHint: Use this if you're experiencing issues. This will reinstall all dependencies.
wine.errorDefault: Failed to initialize bundled Wine. Please try again or check the logs for details.
wine.setupWarning: This may take several minutes. Please do not close the launcher.
wine.setupRequiredDesc: Launching DreamSeeker requires a one-time setup, may take up to 5 minutes.
wine.resetSuggestion: Reset the Wine prefix from Settings
wine.checkLogs: Check the logs for more details
wine.renderingPipelineDesc: Choose how DirectX rendering is handled. DXVK uses Vulkan and works best on modern GPUs. WineD3D uses OpenGL and may fix flickering or tile layering issues.
wine.renderingPipelineHint: Changing this requires a Wine prefix reset to take effect.

age.title: Age Verification
age.prompt: You must be at least 18 years old to view 18+ servers.
age.disclaimer: This is only stored locally on your device and is not sent to any server.
